_pipeline_doc.title: Module 02 - Agentic n8n Automation Pipeline
_pipeline_doc.architecture: Webhook -> JS Sanitizer -> Google Sheets -> VIP Filter -> Human Review (Telegram) -> Deep Audit Bridge
_pipeline_doc.human_in_the_loop: VIP Filter gates all high-score leads. Telegram alert gives operator visibility before AI acts on audit/CRM steps.
reliability_features: Multi-pass JS data sanitizer with URL decoding and whitespace normalization
Score-based triage: only leads scoring >= 3 escalate to human review
All records persisted to Google Sheets (full auditability)
Regional contact window logic: time-zone-aware routing
30-second timeout on bridge requests with explicit error paths
